name: @tootallnate/ffmpeg-bink2-video-wasm
description: Bink 2 video decoder (KB2f...KB2n) extension for @tootallnate/ffmpeg-wasm. Based on Paul B Mahol's bink2 patch. Pair with @tootallnate/ffmpeg-bink-demuxer-wasm.

scripts.build: if [ -x /tmp/wasi-sdk/bin/clang ]; then make; fi && mkdir -p dist && cp src/bink2-video.so dist/bink2-video.so

author: Nathan Rajlich <n@n8.io>
